positive: A mystical fox silhouette surrounded by bioluminescent flora and stylized cosmic elements. The fox is captured mid-leap, creating a dynamic and elegant pose. The composition should be highly symmetrical with the fox centered, utilizing negative space effectively. Use strong, contrasting colors: deep indigo blues, electric cyan, vibrant neon magenta, and glowing gold accents. The style should be a blend of Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock printing and modern low-poly vector art, giving it a crisp, stylized look perfect for apparel printing. Clean lines, bold contours, and a dramatic, ethereal glow coming from the flora. Isolated on a dark, deep space background.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, writing, lowres, bad anatomy, grainy, noise, extra limbs, poor composition, photographic, realism, gradient, smudge, messy, abstract clutter
